title: View options: show column descriptions
excerpt: Ability to pin the column description view, instead of just being able to click to view. And/or, the ability to increase the height of the column names, as you can do with item rows - single, double, or triple height.

posts.author: GoodWork (Lisa Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml: Ability to pin the column description view, instead of just being able to click to view. And/or, the ability to increase the height of the column names, as you can do with item rows - single, double, or triple height.
